creator: nobutaka@nobutaka.com
text:
Hi,

At Sun, 31 Oct 1999 15:14:10 +0800 (CST),
clive@cirx.org wrote:
> 
> 	I have the habit to make install a software then make deinstall after
>     doing that. If everything's ok, I'll really install it. So I found the
>     missing line should be in gimp1-i18n/pkg/PLIST :)

libexec/gimp/1.1/plug-ins/helpbrowser is installed when GNOME is installed..
I have removed it from PLIST since make package fails when GNOME isn't installed.

Thanks,


-Nobutaka
